prestazioni: Engine swap to a Mazda F6A 660cc turbocharged inline-3 (from the Autozam AZ-1) with a custom billet crankshaft and forged pistons from Tomei, paired with a Garrett GT12 turbo (40mm compressor wheel) for 12 psi of boost, targeting 150 hp at the wheels on E85 fuel with a Haltech Elite 1500 ECU managing direct port injection and sequential ignition timing.

Full drivetrain reinforcement including a Cusco 1.5-way limited-slip differential, Nismo carbon driveshaft, and a 5-speed manual transmission swap from the Mazda Carol (with a PPG close-ratio gearset and OS Giken twin-plate clutch) to handle the increased torque without shearing gears.

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for the Laputa’s 800kg curb weight), Whiteline adjustable sway bars (22mm front, 19mm rear), and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0115-K) to eliminate chassis flex during aggressive cornering on Kei-car-spec 13-inch wheels.
estetica: Custom Rocket Bunny-inspired widebody kit (hand-fabricated from 1.2mm steel) with integrated fender vents to direct airflow to the intercooler, paired with a carbon fiber hood featuring a functional scoop for the turbo inlet.

Full respray in Mazda’s original ‘Sunlight Silver Metallic’ (code 17G) with a 3-stage pearl coat, complemented by JDM-spec yellow-tinted headlights (from the 1999 Laputa Turbo RS) and a custom rear diffuser from Varis (carbon fiber, bolt-on for the Laputa’s 1.3m width).

Interior stripped and rebuilt with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (Kei-car-specific mounting brackets), a Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel (with quick-release hub), and a full digital dash from AIM MXS Strada (displaying boost, oil temp, and wideband AFR) mounted on a custom aluminum dash panel.
